cards.title: AI Hype vs. Real Utility: The Unsexy Tools That Win
cards.thesis: While there's a clear backlash against the overhyped use of 'AI' as a buzzword, people are still actively seeking and building practical tools to make specific AI applications more useful. The real opportunity isn't in the shiny new AI models, but in the unglamorous, basic utilities that make existing AI products actually work better for everyday tasks.

evidence.text: There's an extension called 'Enshittifier' that replaces 'AI' with a poop emoji, showing a clear frustration with the term's overuse.
People are creating Chrome extensions like the 'Web Clipper for NotebookLM' to enhance specific AI tools, indicating a need for better integration and utility for these products.

cards.opportunity: Instead of getting caught up in the 'AI is everything' hype, find a new AI tool that's gaining traction and is clearly missing a super basic browser extension – like a one-click content clipper or a quick summarizer for specific pages. Shipping that simple utility, which you could probably code in a weekend, will capture all the early adopters who just want their favorite new AI app to integrate seamlessly with their workflow.
